en.atmosphere: Single-line terminus. Bedroom community with 31,712 daily riders.
en.landmarks: Large green space (353k sqm). Walking trails, parks.
en.food: Limited dining (13 places). Rely on chains and fast food.
en.nightlife: Sparse nightlife. Neighborhood bars only. Early closing.

ja.landmarks: 大きな公園（353k㎡）。緑の散歩道。
ja.food: 食べ物少ない（13軒）。コンビニ頼り。
